transcript.speaker: actor
transcript.message: Hi, thanks for getting in touch. Could you tell me what you do for work and when you're hoping to move in?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.message: I’m a Product Manager and my partner Sophie works in marketing. We’re looking to move in next month. When would be a good time to come see the flat?

transcript.speaker: actor
transcript.message: Okay, that works. You can call me on 07123456789 tomorrow to arrange a viewing. How about Saturday at 2pm?
